{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322075300B2D8BD1D5F33CEA6C808"}"},"total":4777},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7124369098586915624","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看完了，边看边听，确实好看，给作者点赞，主角的冷静，杀伐果断，条理分明刻画的很深入。金手指是我个人特别喜欢的，看过太多的系统，老爷爷，空间都是千篇一律，作者把登仙之路的重重艰难写的淋淋尽致，很精彩很深入人心！缺点是作者距离感可能不强，尤其是半个时辰30里路，确实让人无语，如果后期有歌女主角就更完美了，宇宙是有阴阳的，一本好的书也应该有女主，不能阴阳调和这本书也不完美！后期加油💪","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774137180CEA6C808%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227124369098586915624%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227046690057708637219%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658771819,"group_id":"7046690057708637219","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8W7q5rD2Si7WOX+jJJb70nGkLTgvVxzOeCmFFNydORQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2708830095947919","user_name":"明明是你先出手的"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2708830095947919","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7046690057708637219","book_info":{"abstract":"（无女主+凡人流+残酷修行流，《开局：一块残玉窥仙秘》《恐怖修仙路》《神秘，仙路，钓鱼佬》《诡道仙路》同步更新）
世上本没有路，走的人多了就有了路。
无道捡到神秘紫光细木，降临修仙界，残酷的世界，上层封锁一切，底层修士披荆斩棘才有一线生机。
----------
顺则人，逆则仙，只在中间颠倒颠！
一步退，仙路断。
二步退，命也无。
三步退，无来世。
争命，争道，争长生，仙路漫漫不可退。
炼气、筑基、金丹、元婴、化神……一句成仙！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bce573cb1d40fbf8fce1dc36b2d542ae","author":"头很大的T君","author_id":"","book_id":"7046690057708637219","book_name":"苟到极致，修仙路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#001018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7046691026110513675","read_count":"36013","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3107326"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1534","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,无女主,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5eb222ae08d446ab5af89429544e5fd1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321180&x-signature=olgsf%2FH%2B6qQEnHZRvXOub%2BaKZS4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1881973214949848","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.37853749e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322075300B2D8BD1D5F33CEA6C808"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读103小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":32,"fo
